hero.title: Connect Directly.
hero.description: The freight platform that matches SME shippers with carriers who have available capacity. No intermediaries. Transparent pricing. Secure payments.

features.title: Why shippers and carriers choose FreightShare
features.subtitle: Built for small and medium businesses across Europe

directConnections.title: Direct Connections
directConnections.description: Connect directly with verified carriers or shippers. No intermediaries taking margins.

transparentPricing.title: Transparent Pricing
transparentPricing.description: See all costs upfront. No hidden fees, no surprises at delivery.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.description: Escrow-style payments protect both parties. Carriers get paid when delivery is confirmed.

verifiedPartners.title: Verified Partners
verifiedPartners.description: All users are verified businesses. Trade with confidence across Europe.

step1.title: Post Your Load
step1.description: Enter shipment details: origin, destination, pallet count, and dates.

step2.title: Receive Offers
step2.description: Carriers with matching routes submit competitive price offers.

step3.title: Accept & Pay
step3.description: Choose the best offer. Payment is held securely until delivery.

step4.title: Confirm Delivery
step4.description: Once delivered, confirm and release payment to the carrier.

step1.title: Post Your Route
step1.description: Share your planned routes with available pallet capacity.

step2.title: Find Matching Loads
step2.description: Get matched with loads that fit your route and schedule.

step3.title: Make Offers
step3.description: Submit competitive offers on loads that match your routes.

step4.title: Deliver & Get Paid
step4.description: Complete the delivery and receive payment directly.

cta.title: Ready to ship smarter?
cta.description: Join the marketplace that puts shippers and carriers first.

footer.tagline: Connecting shippers and carriers directly across Europe.

auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
auth.chooseRole: Choose how you'll use the platform
auth.carrierDesc: Find loads and grow your business
auth.fillDetails: Fill in your details to get started

whyFreightShare.title: European logistics infrastructure for SMEs and carriers
whyFreightShare.intro1: Small and medium businesses struggle to access efficient national and international transport at small volumes. Meanwhile, carriers operate with significant unused capacity on existing routes.
whyFreightShare.intro2: FreightShare connects these two realities directly — without intermediaries, without complexity.
whyFreightShare.scaleSubtitle: European road logistics operates far below its potential. These gaps create cost and competitive disadvantages across the supply chain.

stat1.label: of truck capacity in Europe runs empty or underutilized on average

stat2.label: more per unit — what SMEs pay for transport compared to large shippers

stat3.label: of logistics value captured by intermediaries as margin

stat4.label: Road freight is one of the largest contributors to transport-related CO₂

whyFreightShare.mechanismSubtitle: A straightforward mechanism that connects available capacity with shipping demand.

step1.title: SMEs ship by pallet
step1.description: Post any shipment size — from a single pallet to partial loads. No full truckload required.

step2.title: Carriers post routes
step2.description: Transport companies publish existing routes with available pallet capacity.

step3.title: Loads match to routes
step3.description: Shipments are matched onto routes already running — no new trucks added.

step4.title: Transparent payment
step4.description: Pricing is visible upfront. Payments are processed securely on the platform.

whyFreightShare.efficiencySubtitle: Environmental benefits are a direct consequence of optimization — not a separate initiative.

betterLoadFactors.title: Better load factors
betterLoadFactors.description: When trucks run closer to capacity, fewer empty kilometers are traveled per unit shipped.

noAdditionalVehicles.title: No additional vehicles
noAdditionalVehicles.description: FreightShare fills capacity on trucks already running. We don't add new vehicles to the road.

lowerEmissions.title: Lower emissions per unit
lowerEmissions.description: Increasing average truck utilization by just 10% reduces CO₂ emissions per unit shipped proportionally.

whyFreightShare.valueSubtitle: FreightShare creates opportunities for SME shippers and carriers equally.

sme1.title: Access national and international markets
sme1.description: Ship to destinations across Europe without needing full truckloads

sme2.title: Ship smaller volumes competitively
sme2.description: Pallet-level shipping at rates previously reserved for large shippers

sme3.title: Predictable pricing and visibility
sme3.description: See prices upfront. Track shipments. No hidden fees.

carrier1.title: Monetize unused capacity
carrier1.description: Turn empty pallet positions into revenue on routes you're already running

carrier2.title: Improve route profitability
carrier2.description: Increase revenue per trip without adding operational complexity

carrier3.title: Access SME demand directly
carrier3.description: Connect with shippers who need your routes — no intermediary required

whyFreightShare.downstreamText: More efficient logistics lowers distribution costs. Improved market access increases product availability. More resilient supply chains benefit end consumers indirectly.
whyFreightShare.ctaSubtitle: Join the platform that connects SME shippers with carriers directly. No intermediaries, no hidden fees.

payment.escrowInfo: Funds are held securely until delivery is confirmed
